name: Martha Knows Best
overview: Follow trusted lifestyle expert Martha Stewart as she completes a variety of beautiful outdoor projects at her Bedford, New York, farm. Throughout the series, Martha’s superfans — as well as a few of her famous friends — will virtually pop in to chat with her and get advice on their own home projects.

trailers.title: If anyone can put the 'G' back in HGTV, it's Martha Stewart.👩🏼‍🌾🌻
